summary: SKM_Manny head gib — extracted at the M_HeadLegs/M_torso material seam, neck capped, origin-centered. Severed-head physics prop.

warnings: Material slot names differ from grounding: FBX carries MI_Manny_02_Blue (slot0)/MI_Manny_01_Blue (slot1), not M_torso/M_HeadLegs. Slot 1 empirically confirmed = head+legs (spans floor->crown).

Extraction method switched from material-seam-cap-Z to skeletal weighting (head+neck_01+neck_02): the material-cap recipe over-captured clavicle/upperarm caps (slot1, >1.40m) and fragmented the head into 5 shells.
Mesh imported at metre scale; cm thresholds mapped accordingly. Armature 0.01 unit-scale re-baked into the static mesh after parent removal.
audit.report: Head extracted by head/neck bone weight, seams welded (merge-by-distance, 5 shells -> 1), neck hole capped (n-gon+poke), normals outward. Closed manifold: 0 open-boundary / 0 non-manifold edges. 4662 verts / 9320 tris-source. Bbox 17.7 x 22.7 x 26.7 cm (head-sized). Origin = volume center of mass at world origin; transform clean (loc0/rot0/scale1).
